title: Den (disambiguation)
content:
'''Den''' could refer to

==Canon==
*'''[[The Den]]''', a shady business in [[Daiyu City]]
*'''[[Den (Ring of Kafrene)|Den]]''', a location used by the [[Zero Company]] on the [[Ring of Kafrene]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Den]]''', an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] working at [[Premier Provisions]]
*'''[[Den Dhur]]''', a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] journalist and war corespondent
*'''[[Den Siva]]''', a [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] warrior infatuated with the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Dani/Legends|Dani]]
*'''[[Denn Solo]]''', the supposed grandfather of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]
*'''[[Denetrus]]''', a small-time [[Telos IV]] criminal who often went by the name Den
*'''[[The Dens]]''', a location in [[Qaestar Town]]
*'''[[Rancor's Den]]'''

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Den
}}
